title: Steering inference API skeleton
goal: Implement OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint with validated steering payload support.
constraints: Preserve OpenAI response compatibility for baseline fields.
Reject invalid steering payloads with deterministic 4xx responses.
Include resolved profile metadata in response extensions.
definition_of_done: POST /v1/chat/completions accepts messages and steering config.
profile_id resolution succeeds against profile registry.
rollback_note: If compatibility breaks clients, disable steering parser path and serve baseline OpenAI-compatible response shape only.
